title.en: There is no way to stop this unless the real co...

content.en:
meeting.

Ye Tian held a meeting with the many True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Hall and began to discuss from various aspects, including how to cultivate geniuses.

The Void Heaven Pulse is now the fifth transcendent force, plus it has obtained a lot of inheritance, and it is also handy in cultivating geniuses, plus it controls several true kingdoms, and there is no shortage of geniuses.

But there are still many geniuses who have been secretly recruited by other forces, and the Void Heaven Temple is also very troubled by this.

There is no way to stop this unless the real country is completely blocked.

Fortunately, those forces are secretly soliciting, and they can't solicit too much, and the impact is not very great.

As long as more and more strong people are born in the Void Sky Pulse, there will definitely be more geniuses who choose the Void Heaven Pulse, and no matter how tempted other forces are, it will be difficult to snatch the genius of the Void Heaven Pulse.

However, the leader of this meeting was not Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's strength is indeed good, but after all, he has just been promoted to True Ancestor, and the Void Heaven Pulse has descended many True Ancestors from the chaos, including many ancient True Ancestors.

The strength of these ancient true ancestors is very strong, and five of them are top true ancestors (the strength is all based on the standard of the five true ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm), and the strength of these five top true ancestors can barely compete with the pseudo-Dao ancestors, how powerful is their combat power.

They all failed to impact the Dao Ancestor, and they could no longer use the Merge Dao Treasure to impact the Dao Ancestor realm, so they entered the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to find a way to break through.

One of the most powerful True Ancestors is named Moon Shooting True Ancestor, who is good at the art of bows and arrows, and has shocked countless powerhouses in Chaos with his one-handed bow and arrow technique.

And the True Ancestor who is presiding over the meeting now is the True Ancestor of the Shooting Moon, but Ye Tian's strength is also very strong, and he can be regarded as one of the high-level people present.

"Moon Shooting True Ancestor, there is a message from the Void Heaven Realm that someone from the Dark Temple has infiltrated the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!" said a True Ancestor who was in charge of intelligence.

"The Dark Temple sent people into the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, they are so bold, they dare to come in at this time?" said the Moon Shooting True Ancestor with a frown.

"Could it be some conspiracy?"

Speculation has been raised.

"Everyone pay attention to it, investigate it carefully!, although the current Dark God Temple is far inferior to our Void Heaven Lineage, they are not weak at the True Ancestor level, we must be careful!" the Moon Shooting True Ancestor reminded.

"Yes!"

Many True Ancestors answered one by one.

After the meeting, Ye Tian also left.

However, it didn't take long for a piece of news to arrive.

The three True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Hall were assassinated, and these three True Ancestors were all elite True Ancestors who had cultivated to the late stage of the Great Dao Realm, and they were not weak among the elite True Ancestors, and they were definitely the backbone of the Void Heaven Temple.

But now, the three True Ancestors have been assassinated, and they can't even come to the rescue.

This is enough to prove that the person who made the shot was the top True Ancestor, but the top True Ancestor was such a person, he basically rarely made a move, unless it was a big war between forces.

"Who broke the rules?"

When the Moon Shooting True Ancestor found out, he was furious.

This is someone declaring war on the Void Sky Pulse!

In the following days, from time to time, the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Temple fell, and the places where they fell were basically outside the True Kingdom.

After all, it was impossible for the True Ancestor of the Void Heaven Temple to stay in the True Country all the time, and occasionally he would go to other places to find opportunities.

After this incident, many True Ancestors returned to the True Kingdom and no longer went out to adventure.

......

Liulizong.

Xuangang True Ancestor and Huoyun True Ancestor were chatting about the killing of the True Ancestor of the Void Heaven Temple.

"Fire Cloud True Ancestor, I have already sent three top True Ancestors to assassinate the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Lineage, and I have already killed at least dozens of True Ancestors, including several elite True Ancestors who are close to the top True Ancestor level. Moreover, according to our investigation, some of the top True Ancestors of the Void Heaven One Vein have all impacted the Dao Ancestor realm, resulting in a relatively rare batch of top True Ancestors, and it seems that there are only three top True Ancestors sitting in the Void Heaven True Country, so the Void Heaven True Kingdom is too weak for us, and we can continue to assassinate them!"

Xuangang True Ancestor Dao.

"Thank you Xuangang True Ancestor!" Huoyun True Ancestor smiled happily: "However, there are still a lot of True Ancestors in the Void Heaven Lineage, and only a few dozen of them have been killed so far, which is not even a fraction, do you want to start a war with the Void Heaven True Nation in an all-round way?"

"No way!"

Xuangang True Ancestor immediately refused, and said: "We can't start a full-scale war, otherwise our Liuli Sect will suffer great losses, and who knows if other forces will attack our Liuli Sect at this time, we can't take this risk, or take the road of assassination, and keep assassinating them until they collapse!"

"Then let's do it first!"

Huoyun True Ancestor was a little disappointed, he couldn't wait any longer, and hoped that the Liuli Sect would start a war with the Void Heaven True Ancestor as soon as possible, but this was obviously impossible, the Liuli Sect was unwilling to take risks, and he couldn't influence the Xuangang True Ancestor's thoughts.

Suddenly.

Huoyun True Ancestor thought of something, and hurriedly said: "Xuangang True Ancestor, the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor of the Void Heaven True Realm, is the personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and has also obtained three records of the Xuanxuan Ancient Realm, known as the strongest new True Ancestor, if he is allowed to grow up, it will definitely be a big threat to our Liuli Sect, and he needs to be eradicated as soon as possible!"

Huoyun True Ancestor hated Ye Tian very much, because it was Ye Tian who led a large number of half-step True Ancestors to break through the Dark God True Realm in the first place, so he really wanted Ye Tian to die.

Xuangang True Ancestor listened to Huoyun True Ancestor's words, pondered for a while, nodded and said: "That Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor Ye Tian is indeed a huge threat, if this kind of demon grows up, it will indeed pose a threat to our Liuli Sect, but he is still in the Void Heaven True Realm, if you want to assassinate him, the price will not be small." Is there a way for you to lure him out of the Void Heaven True Realm, when I send three top True Ancestors to assassinate him at the same time, killing a new True Ancestor who has just been promoted, it will definitely be easy to capture!"

"Draw out the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor Ye Tian?"

The Fire Cloud True Ancestor fell into deep thought.

After a long time, Huoyun True Ancestor came up with a way and said, "Xuangang True Ancestor, Wanfa True Ancestor is not only the true ancestor of the Void Heaven Temple, but also the leader of the human race, and he seems to attach great importance to the human race. And the human race currently has a large population, and there are many geniuses, many of whom are breaking through the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, we can capture a large number of human geniuses, which should attract the true ancestors of the Ten Thousand Laws. Of course, if he doesn't come out, we have nothing to lose. "

"This is a good idea!"

Xuangang True Ancestor nodded in satisfaction and adopted Huoyun True Ancestor's suggestion.

-----------------

A month later.

The faces of the high-level Terran people were not good-looking, because during this time, many Terran powerhouses and geniuses could not be contacted, and various evidence proved that those Terran powerhouses and geniuses did not fall, but were captured.

This angered the Terrans!

Today's human race is not weak, among the indigenous races in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the human race is definitely the first major race, in addition to true ancestors like Ye Tian, there are also many true ancestors and many half-step true ancestors.

And now, many Heavenly Monarchs, True Monarchs, and several half-step True Ancestors of the Human Race have disappeared, and the person who does it must be a powerhouse at the True Ancestor level.

So, several true ancestors of the human race were discussing.

This matter is about the human race, but it has not yet been staged to the extent of threatening the Void Heaven True Kingdom, so it is difficult for them to ask other True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom for help.

As time passed, the Terrans never figured out who was capturing them.

"Go and invite Lord Wanfa True Ancestor to come!"

A True Ancestor suggested.

Everyone nodded and informed Ye Tian of this matter.

Ye Tian rarely manages the human race, but when such a big thing happens, he naturally can't ignore it.

Terran Temple.

Ye Tian sat on the high seat, several other True Ancestors and a number of half-step True Ancestors sat around, and the meeting began.

"Any clues?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There are no clues! I only know that the other party should be the True Ancestor, and he has a hidden aura and a treasure of whereabouts. "The Terran Rising Rookie Mountain True Ancestor stood up and said.

"No clues!"

"No clues!"

"No clues!"

A high-ranking Terran spoke.

Suddenly, another half-step True Ancestor said: "Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor, one of my descendants is also missing, but there is a special perceptual treasure on my heir, I can initially sense the direction, but if I want to know the location specifically, I need to be close to be able to confirm it!"

"Seriously!"

Ye Tian was slightly excited.

"Seriously!"

That half-step True Ancestor Dao.

Ye Tian then learned about the identity of this half-step true ancestor, a genius carefully cultivated by the human race, named Yao Yu, and also a disciple of the great sect, the possibility of betraying the human race was very small.

Moreover, Ye Tian also used the copying talent to check the other party's talent and confirm that the other party was not someone else's disguise.

So, Ye Tian took Yao Yu out of the Void Heaven True Country, and searched for the traces of the enemy through the faint sense of sensing the treasure.
